texto: The sacralization of the party opened the way to the sacralization of Stalin when he became the supreme leader. After 1929, the political religion of Russia mainly concentrated on the deification of Stalin, who until his death in 1953 dominated the party and Soviet system like a tyrannical and merciless deity.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Emilio Gentile: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a lideranca. O trecho “The sacralization of the party opened the way to the sacralization of Stalin when he became the s…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, atheism, religion pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e religion.
